name: Tallyfy
description: Tallyfy — workflow and process management for repeatable business tasks. Checklists, forms, and conditional logic replace messy spreadsheets.

seo.title: Tallyfy — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Tallyfy: Tallyfy — workflow and process management for repeatable business tasks. Checklists, forms, and conditional logic replace messy spreadsheets.

when_to_use: Repeatable client onboarding checklist replacing a spreadsheet
Conditional logic workflow for employee request handling
Operations SOP turned into a trackable digital process
Multi-step business process with form-based hand-offs
Process documentation that runs itself via Tallyfy automation

pros: Real workflow engine — not just checklists
API allows integration with existing stack
cons: Reporting shallow compared to Process Street
Limited templates out of the box
review.verdict: Decent workflow tool for repeatable processes, though Process Street and Pipefy feel more modern at similar price.
review.best_for: Ops managers formalizing recurring SOPs with conditional logic and form-based handoffs
review.not_for: Teams that need polished UX or already live inside Notion and Monday
